name: Resting Metabolic Rate Calculator
seo_description: Calculate resting metabolic rate. Free, fast and no sign-up required.
result_context: The RMR is ligeramente lesser that BMR; represents calories necesarias in estado of reposo complete.
formula_display: Hombre: RMR = 9.99 × weight + 6.25 × height - 4.92 × edad + 5; Mujer: RMR = 9.99 × weight + 6.25 × height - 4.92 × edad - 161
steps: The calculador apply the formula automatically and muestra results
mistakes: Not verifying that weight are in correct units before Calculate
Redondear values intermediums before of the calculation final (pierde precision)
Apply results without Consider contexto individual or condition is special
desc: Free online rmr calculator. Enter weight and height to get instant results.
